channel.title: MindExtract
channel.description: MindExtract — download and transcribe video from anywhere

item.title: Version 1.5.1
item.description:
What's New in 1.5.1

  • Redesigned transcription window — Cleaner UI matching the rest of the app, with consistent fonts and styling
  • MacWhisper-style timeline — Segments with left accent bar, text-first layout, and click-to-seek
  • Built-in audio player — Play back transcribed audio with scrubbing, speed control (0.5x–2x), and segment seeking
  • Compact header — Segmented tab picker, inline status pills, toggleable search
